instruction: Generate an operator-only weekly draft from Google Sheet evidence marked KEEP. Do not send to subscribers and do not enable the report schedule.
rules: Read only KEEP rows in the seven-day report window
Exclude CUT, WATCH and PENDING rows
Preserve source URLs and item IDs in the evidence packet
Send draft review only to the operator through SES or save private HTML to S3
Fail closed when there are no approved KEEP rows
Record the curation snapshot used for the draft
acceptance_criteria: A row changed from CUT to KEEP appears in the next draft
A row changed from KEEP to CUT does not appear
The draft contains a source ledger
stop_after: Return draft-flow behavior, tests and deployment implications, then stop.
